utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items required in the format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) destination: specified as Lisbon, Portugal (fully specified). 2) travel_dates: 'July 1-5, 2024' (specific dates provided; fully specified). 3) transportation: flight details with costs—includes airline type (Budget Airline), class (Economy), route (LHR to Lisbon), party size (2 adults, 2 children), and cost (€400). Lacks specific flight times/flight numbers but the format only mandates flight details with costs; this is sufficiently specified. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs—Cityscape Hotel, 5 nights (dates), party size, cost (€750); fully specified. 5) activities: selected activities with costs—three activities listed with names and costs; fully specified. 6) additional_services: extra services with costs—remaining budget for meals and examples with price ranges; sufficiently specified. 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown—sum provided (€1,370 + €330 = €1,700); fully specified. Therefore, all 7/7 items are covered.
